parsing_approach: No text parsing at all: introspects the database through stdlib sqlite3 (sqlite_master, PRAGMA table_info, PRAGMA foreign_key_list), opened read-only and immutable via URI. Fully deterministic, sorted output.
extracts: tables with columns (name, type, notnull, primary key)
indexes, views, triggers with their target table (configures edges)
known_limitations: Binary artefact: no line spans (span is null).
Row data is not read — schema only.
Databases requiring extensions to open will fail cleanly.
